G1_official_checkpoint.reason: No official-checkpoint evaluation on the exact 191-image paper test set is present.

reasons: Current split is 60/20/16 instead of the paper 1398/14728/191 protocol.
Current input is 128x256 grayscale instead of publication-compatible 1024 RGB processing.
Current QuickSemiTransformer is a lightweight surrogate rather than the publication architecture.
Current teacher/student schedule and pseudo-label weighting differ materially from the publication protocol.
Current evaluator is not established as the publication evaluator.

G3_training_reproduction.reason: G1 has not passed and no full paper-faithful training run is present.

defensible_statement: Measured reduced-scale re-simulation; not numerically equivalent to the published full-scale experiment.
highest_priority_next_test: Run the exact released author checkpoint on the exact 191-image paper test set with a publication-compatible evaluator. Do not begin expensive retraining until this passes.
